summary: Adjusted the opening to echo chapter 7's spread of stolen ward names and revised the closing beat to hand off more cleanly to chapter 9's injured-wrist morning in the shop, without changing chapter events or character dynamics.
edits: Linked Silas's arrival in Sump Ward to the day's citywide spread of stolen ward names.
Extended the closing image toward the uphill shop return and Junie's imminent view of his injured hand.
